_meta.purpose: Immutable regression oracle for Build 2 (Step 9 Verify). The human ground-truth verification of all 35 surfaced companies, 2026-05-18, captured BEFORE any automated writer touches the Verification fields. Diff Verify output against this file, never against the live Airtable fields (Verify overwrites them).
_meta.source: agentic-systems manual ground-truth pass vs clinicaltrials.gov API v2, 2026-05-18
_meta.immutability: Do not edit. If the oracle must change, supersede with a new dated file and record why.

Q2_ruling_repro_class.in_record_machine: The cited trial record itself (title or intervention name) contains an AAV / gene-therapy token. A deterministic R5 clause-3 check reproduces Confirmed. Verify MUST match oracle here; a regression to Not confirmed is a real failure.
Q2_ruling_repro_class.domain_knowledge: Oracle Confirmed rests on knowing the product is an AAV gene therapy, but the cited trial record alone names no AAV/gene-therapy token. R5 as written CANNOT reproduce Confirmed without a known-AAV-product gazetteer. Expected machine verdict: Needs review. This divergence is ACCEPTABLE and EXPECTED — a true AAV company landing in human review is safe; it is NOT a regression. Do not 'fix' Verify to force-match these.
Q2_ruling_repro_class.no_nct: No CT.gov ID stored. Machine-reproducible: Verify outputs Needs review. MUST match.
Q2_ruling_repro_class.firmographic_defunct: Oracle Needs review driven by defunct/acquired corporate status (Baxalta -> Shire -> Takeda). NOT derivable from the CT.gov trial API. On trial evidence alone Verify would output Confirmed (NCT01687608 is a real AAV8 FIX gene therapy). This divergence is EXPECTED and out of Verify scope: the defunct/acquired determination belongs to the Part 1 disqualifier 'Acquired or operationally abandoned company', evaluated at the enrichment/firmographic stage, not by Verify. Do not make Verify guess corporate status from CT.gov.
Q2_ruling_repro_class.gene_editing: Oracle Needs review driven by modality being genome editing (ARCUS), not classic AAV gene transfer. R5 as written has no editing-exclusion token, so Verify will likely output Not confirmed (no AAV token in 'PBGENE-DMD'). Divergence direction is conservative (review vs not-confirmed both keep it off the client list). Acceptable; flag, do not block.

_meta.acceptance_test_restated: Verify PASSES if: (1) Pfizer and Ultragenyx => Not confirmed (the proven false-positive class is caught); (2) every in_record_machine row stays Confirmed (no regression); (3) no_nct rows => Needs review. Verify is NOT required to reproduce domain_knowledge, firmographic_defunct, or gene_editing rows bit-for-bit — those divergences are expected and explained per-row below.

rows.divergence_reason: Cited trial intervention GENETIC: VGR-R01; no AAV/gene-therapy token in title or intervention name. AAV status is product knowledge.

NCT01687608 is a real AAV8 FIX gene therapy -> Verify confirms on trial evidence. Oracle's Needs review is driven by defunct/acquired entity (Takeda), a Part 1 firmographic disqualifier out of Verify scope.
GENETIC: MVX-220; no AAV/gene-therapy token in cited record. AAV status is product knowledge.

rows.note: PRIMARY ACCEPTANCE TARGET. Cited NCT03587116 is standard-of-care replacement; clause 3 fails. Verify must reproduce Not confirmed.
SMOKE CONTROL (Confirmed side). Intervention names AAV5 explicitly.

rows.divergence_reason: GENETIC: LY3884961 (PR001); no AAV/gene-therapy token in cited record. AAV9 status is product knowledge.
GENETIC: TN-401; no AAV/gene-therapy token in cited record. AAV9 status is product knowledge.

rows.note: PRIMARY ACCEPTANCE TARGET. Cited NCT04909346 is an anti-AAV antibody/seroprevalence study (OBSERVATIONAL, no therapeutic intervention); clause 1 and clause 3 fail. Verify must reproduce Not confirmed.

rows.divergence_reason: BIOLOGICAL: AGTC-501; no AAV/gene-therapy token in cited record. AAV platform status is product knowledge. Note: 10 NCTs cited; a non-first NCT may carry an in-record token — Verify should test all cited NCTs, not just the first.
BIOLOGICAL: 4D-710; no AAV/gene-therapy token in cited record. AAV (A101 capsid) status is product knowledge. 6 NCTs cited — test all.

rows.note: Upstaza/eladocagene exuparvovec is a genuine AAV2 product; needs an NCT citation attached to flip to Confirmed.

rows.divergence_reason: PBGENE-DMD is ARCUS in-vivo genome editing, not classic AAV gene transfer. R5 has no editing-exclusion token; Verify will likely output Not confirmed (no AAV token). Both keep it off the client list — acceptable conservative divergence.
